display.purpose: Media titles in detail sheets and section headers.

title.purpose: Sheet section headers and settings group titles.

body.purpose: Overview text, descriptions, sync status messages.

label.purpose: Filters, tabs, badges, metadata chips, button labels.

shadows.name: embossed-panel
shadows.purpose: Raised surfaces: sheets, modals, settings panels.

shadows.name: cyan-active-glow
shadows.purpose: Active filter tabs, selected chips, focused inputs.

shadows.name: cyan-active-glow-strong
shadows.purpose: Stronger active glow for primary selected states.

motion.name: sheet-enter
motion.purpose: Slide up entrance for bottom sheets (120-200ms).

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Full-width primary action. Used for Save, Sync, and confirm flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; background: #22D3EE; color: #0F1115; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5ee0f2; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Circular icon button for filter, close, and toolbar actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Filter"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="19" height="19" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="4" y1="21" x2="4" y2="14"/><line x1="4" y1="10" x2="4" y2="3"/><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="3"/><line x1="20" y1="21" x2="20" y2="16"/><line x1="20" y1="12" x2="20" y2="3"/><line x1="1" y1="14" x2="7" y2="14"/><line x1="9" y1="8" x2="15" y2="8"/><line x1="17" y1="16" x2="23" y2="16"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #94A3B8; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(34,211,238,0.1); color: #F8FAFC; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #22D3EE; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search field with cyan glow on focus. Used in the search sheet header.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 512px; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 12px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 12px 12px 40px; background: #0F1115; color: #F8FAFC; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 12px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(148,163,184,0.5); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(34,211,238,0.08), 0 0 0 1px #22D3EE; }

components.name: Media Card
components.description: Poster card in grid. Image fills the card; hover scales the image.
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; background: #0F1115; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); transition: border-color 0.2s; aspect-ratio: 2/3; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(34,211,238,0.2); } .ds-card-inner { overflow: hidden; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .ds-card-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-img { transform: scale(1.05); }

components.name: Bottom Sheet
components.description: Bottom-drawer sheet with embossed edge. Signature Void component.
components.html:
Title

Sheet content goes here.
components.css: .ds-sheet-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); } .ds-sheet { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 896px; height: 86vh; max-height: 92vh; background: rgba(15,17,21,0.95); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 24px 24px 0 0; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08), 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-sheet-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); background: rgba(15,17,21,0.8); } .ds-sheet-title { font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #F8FAFC; margin: 0; } .ds-sheet-close { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(34,211,238,0.1); color: #22D3EE; border: 1px solid rgba(34,211,238,0.25); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-sheet-close:hover { background: rgba(34,211,238,0.2); color: #F8FAFC; border-color: rgba(34,211,238,0.4); } .ds-sheet-body { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px; scrollbar-width: none; } .ds-sheet-body::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .ds-sheet-body-text { font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; color: #94A3B8; margin: 0; } .ds-sheet-footer { padding: 12px 16px; padding-bottom: calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); background: rgba(15,17,21,0.4); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); } .ds-sheet-drag { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 44px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(34,211,238,0.1); color: #22D3EE; border: 1px solid rgba(34,211,238,0.25); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-sheet-drag:hover { background: rgba(34,211,238,0.2); color: #F8FAFC; border-color: rgba(34,211,238,0.4); }

components.name: Metadata Chip
components.description: Compact rounded badge for metadata labels (media type, year, rating).
components.css: .ds-chip-group { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #94A3B8; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed bottom bar with toggle and action buttons.
components.css: .ds-bottom-bar { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 30; padding: 12px 12px calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); pointer-events: none; } .ds-bottom-inner { max-width: 384px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr 56px; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px; background: rgba(15,17,21,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 28px; box-shadow: 0 0 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); pointer-events: auto; } .ds-toggle { position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); padding: 4px; } .ds-toggle-pill { position: absolute; top: 4px; bottom: 4px; left: 4px; width: calc(50% - 4px); border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(34,211,238,0.15); box-shadow: 0 0 22px rgba(34,211,238,0.14); transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1); } .ds-toggle-btn { position: relative; z-index: 10; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; border-radius: 9999px; background: none; border: none; color: #94A3B8; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-toggle-btn:hover { color: #F8FAFC; } .ds-toggle-active { color: #22D3EE; }

narrative.overview:
This is not a cozy streaming service. Void is a dim, instrument-like interface — a wall of monitors in a dark room, each screen displaying signal data. The cyan glow has purpose: it marks what's active, what's playing, what's coming next. Everything else recedes into darkness.

The content — movie posters, show stills, backdrop images — provides the color. The interface is the frame, not the picture. Chrome is thin: 1px blueprint borders, translucent glass surfaces, compact uppercase labels. No decorative gradients, no hero metrics, no social feed chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Dark ground as material, not theme. The void is the starting point, not a mode.
Cyan as the single voice for interaction — active, selected, available.
Glass surfaces float above the void. Depth through translucency, not shadows.
Every uppercase label earns its weight. Nothing is 12px bold by accident.
Content (posters, backdrops, stills) is the only color source outside the cyan signal.

rules.name: The Single Voice Rule
rules.body: Cyan is the only interaction color. Green for "watched" confirmations and red for "remove" danger are semantic exceptions, not aesthetic choices.

rules.name: The Blueprint Edge Rule
rules.body: Every surface boundary is 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1). Not 2px, not colored. A thicker border is a mistake; a colored side-stripe is forbidden.

rules.name: The Caps-Only UI Rule
rules.body: All navigation, filter, badge, and button text is uppercase with wide tracking. The only lowercase text in the interface is content — titles, descriptions, metadata values.

rules.name: The Glass-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are layered by opacity, not stacked by shadow. Drop shadows only appear for embossed panels and active-state glow.

dos: Use cyan as the single interaction color. If it's tappable and active, it gets cyan.
Use the Caps-Only UI convention for all navigation, labels, and buttons. Lowercase is reserved for content.
Let poster art and backdrops provide the color. The interface is the frame.
Use blueprint borders (1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) for every surface boundary.
Use glass layering (translucency + backdrop-blur) to create depth.
Use the embossed edge border treatment for raised surfaces like sheets and modals.
Keep card grids compact (8px gap). Information density is part of the identity.
Account for every async state: loading (pulse skeleton), empty (centered message), error (red-tinted banner).
donts: Use black (#000) or white (#fff). Tint all neutrals toward the cool-blue brand hue.
Use glassmorphism as a default. Glass is for sheets and bars.
Use identical card grids with icon + heading + text.
Use modals as the first interaction pattern.
